message: 🌱 Add kcp: Epic: reverse tunnel to pclusters through syncer for pod mission (#665)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kcp-333-epic-reverse-tunnel-to-pclusters-through-syncer-for-pod-subresources",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kcp: Epic: reverse tunnel to pclusters through syncer for pod subresources",
+    "description": "Epic: reverse tunnel to pclusters through syncer for pod subresources. Requested by 1+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kcp deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kcp version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kcp\nhelm list -n kcp 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kcp installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kcp configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kcp configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kcp\nkubectl get configmap -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kcp\n```\nThe kcp apiserver has to talk to the physical cluster for `kubectl exec|attach|logs` because pods are running there through the syncer."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Epic: reverse tunnel to pclusters through syncer for pod",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nAdd functionality to the Syncer to establish reverse connections and act as \"reverse proxy for the downstream clusters.\n\nThe KCP server exposes 2 URLs that allows to proxy over reverse connections with the following format\n-\n```yaml\nkubectl --server=https://{host}/services/syncer-tunnels/clusters/<ws>/apis/workload.kcp.dev/v1alpha1/synctargets/<name>/proxy get deployments -A\nNAMESPACE                      NAME                           READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE\nkcp-syncer-cluster1-195k2b7i   kcp-syncer-cluster1-195k2b7i   1/1     1            1           34m\nkube-system                    coredns                        2/2     2            2           4h53m\nlocal-path-storage             local-path-provisioner         1/1     1            1           4h53m\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kcp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kcp\nkubectl get events -n kcp --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Epic: reverse tunnel to pclusters through syncer for pod\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nAdd functionality to the Syncer to establish reverse connections and act as \"reverse proxy for the downstream clusters.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubectl --server=https://{host}/services/syncer-tunnels/clusters/<ws>/apis/workload.kcp.dev/v1alpha1/synctargets/<name>/proxy get deployments -A\nNAMESPACE                      NAME                           READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE\nkcp-syncer-cluster1-195k2b7i   kcp-syncer-cluster1-195k2b7i   1/1     1            1           34m\nkube-system                    coredns                        2/2     2            2           4h53m\nlocal-path-storage             local-path-provisioner         1/1     1            1           4h53m",
+        "kubectl --server=https://{host}/services/syncer-tunnels/clusters/<ws>/apis/workload.kcp.dev/v1alpha1/synctargets/<name>/proxy get pods -A\nNAMESPACE                      NAME                                            READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE\nkcp-syncer-cluster1-195k2b7i   kcp-syncer-cluster1-195k2b7i-7bbc5698dc-pjm2t   1/1     Running   0          32m\nkube-system                    coredns-6d4b75cb6d-6g5jz                        1/1     Running   0          4h54m\nkube-system                    coredns-6d4b75cb6d-qb22j                        1/1     Running   0          4h54m\nkube-system                    etcd-kind-control-plane                         1/1     Running   0          4h54m\nkube-system                    kindnet-8mtcr                                   1/1     Running  ",
+        "kubectl --server=https://{host}/services/syncer-tunnels/clusters/<ws>/apis/workload.kcp.dev/v1alpha1/synctargets/<name>/proxy -n kube-system logs coredns-6d4b75cb6d-6g5jz\n.:53\n[INFO] plugin/reload: Running configuration MD5 = db32ca3650231d74073ff4cf814959a7\nCoreDNS-1.8.6\nlinux/amd64, go1.17.1, 13a9191"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kcp",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kcp"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Serviceaccount"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kcp-dev/kcp/issues/333",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kcp-dev/kcp",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kcp-dev/kcp/pull/873"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kcp installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },

+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:32:40.208Z",
